texto: Isn't it what life is about, after all? A series of images that pass us by like towns as you cross along a long road? Then suddenly, a scenario stands and we know that image, that moment and all the feelings connected to it will remain alive no matter what?
autor: Angélica Calheiros - Nove dias para amar
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Angélica Calheiros - Nove dias para amar: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Isn't it what life is about, after all? A series of images that pass us by like towns as you cros…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, brazilian-literature, memories pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e vida.
